flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Black Hawk College fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (25.3% → 21.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Black Hawk College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.5k → $8.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Black Hawk College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $4.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Black Hawk College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
